mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns show no statistical correlation with FEDFUNDS changes, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points within a single month signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering negative equity returns as earnings expectations are downgraded.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 65% of instances when UNRATE spikes above the threshold, or the signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and builder confidence, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint positive deviation of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns, or the interaction term shows negative coefficient in out-of-sample regression.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production below its 12-month moving average signals supply-side weakness that immediately penalizes equity valuations over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive or flat when INDPRO falls below its moving average during tightening periods, or the signal reverses direction in easing regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained CPIAUCSL growth below 1.5% year-over-year confirms disinflationary pressure, allowing risk assets to appreciate as real yields decline over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns do not materialize when inflation stays below the threshold, or the signal generates negative alpha during deflationary scares.

mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases aggregate disposable income and corporate revenue forecasts, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero or negative correlation with 60-day forward returns across multiple market cycles, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between slowing GDP growth and declining real personal consumption expenditures signals weakening domestic demand, causing immediate negative equity repricing over the next week.
failure_condition: The negative divergence between GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to predict negative 5-day returns, or the interaction effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals improving supply chain efficiency and higher corporate output margins, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days during economic expansions.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 20-day returns during expansion regimes, or the signal turns negative during contraction phases.
